description: Your youth-soccer club's schedule, teams, and dues from the terminal — with merged multi-kid agendas, conflict detection, and iCal export no dashboard gives you.

tools.name: account_clubs
tools.description: List clubs this account belongs to. Returns array of GenericObject.

tools.name: account_me
tools.description: Get your club-user account profile. Returns the Account.

tools.name: account_roles
tools.description: List your account roles. Returns array of GenericObject.

tools.name: club_get
tools.description: Get club metadata. Returns the GenericObject.

tools.name: club_settings
tools.description: Get public club settings. Returns the GenericObject.

tools.name: family_get
tools.description: Get your family (parents/guardians and players). Optional: include-parents-without-login (default: true). Returns the Family.

params.name: include-parents-without-login
params.description: Include parents/guardians who have no login

tools.name: payments_failed
tools.description: List failed payments. Optional: include-donations (default: false). Returns array of Payment.

tools.name: payments_overdue-invoices
tools.description: List overdue invoice payments (dues owed). Returns array of Payment.

tools.name: payments_overdue-tickets
tools.description: List overdue ticket payments. Returns array of Payment.

tools.name: players_list
tools.description: List your players (children) on this account. Optional: include-inactives (default: false). Returns array of Player.

tools.name: programs_list
tools.description: List all club programs/seasons. Returns array of Program.

tools.name: programs_open
tools.description: List programs currently open for registration. Optional: include-credits (default: true). Returns array of OpenProgram.

tools.name: registrations_completed
tools.description: List completed program registrations (with balances). Returns array of Registration.

tools.name: registrations_team
tools.description: List completed team registrations. Returns array of Registration.

tools.name: schedule_event-types
tools.description: List calendar event types (game, practice, etc.). Optional: include-facility-rentals (default: false). Returns array of EventType.

tools.name: schedule_list
tools.description: List calendar events in a date window (max ~31 days). Dates are YYYY-MM-DD. Required: start, end. Returns array of CalendarEvent.

params.name: end
params.description: Window end date (YYYY-MM-DD); must be within ~31 days of start

tools.name: schedule_settings
tools.description: Calendar display settings for the club. Returns the GenericObject.

tools.name: teams_list
tools.description: List every team in the club. Returns array of Team.

tools.name: teams_mine
tools.description: List the teams your players are assigned to. Returns array of PlayerTeam.
